pi_items.source: Task description explicitly requires creating the system in the 'world' database.
Task description explicitly requires creating a table named 'mv_country_stats'.
Task description explicitly requires creating a stored procedure named 'sp_refresh_country_stats'.
Task description explicitly requires adding an index named 'idx_mv_continent'.
Task description explicitly requires exporting to '/home/ga/Documents/exports/country_stats.csv'.
Verified by downloading and parsing the official MySQL 'world' sample database, which contains exactly 239 INSERT statements for the 'country' table.
Task verification logic inherently uses 'USA' as a probe point for validating aggregations.
Verified by downloading the official MySQL 'world' sample database and parsing the 'city' table; filtering by 'USA' yields exactly 274 records.
Verified by downloading the official MySQL 'world' sample database, parsing the 'city' table, and sorting USA cities by population.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on the official MySQL 'world' sample database, which contains exactly 239 countries. A simulated materialized view named 'mv_country_stats' must be created via a stored procedure 'sp_refresh_country_stats' and an index 'idx_mv_continent'. Output is directed to '/home/ga/Documents/exports/country_stats.csv'. Data verification on the probe country 'USA' confirms it has exactly 274 associated cities in the database, with 'New York' being the most populous.
